The People Behind It

Our Leadership

KN

Kapil Nagar

Co-Founder & Legal Head

Senior Advocate at the High Court with 10+ years of legal experience and 7+ years in property dealings. Having personally witnessed fraudulent deals, Kapil built JS Infra Group to ensure every transaction is legally airtight and every buyer is protected. His mission is simple: secure futures through secure property.

Senior Advocate, High Court
TS

Tanuj Sharma

Co-Founder & Business Head

A sharp, data-driven strategist with a background as a Portfolio Advisor. Tanuj brings stock market discipline to real estate — identifying high-appreciation assets before the market catches on. He leads business development with a focus on long-term value and lasting partnerships.

Portfolio Advisor | Market Strategist
SS

Sanjay Sharma

External Consultant

Nearly two decades of corporate project management, 7–8 years as an entrepreneur, and active in real estate since age 25. Sanjay brings deep market intelligence, a vast network, and transaction expertise that gives JS Infra Group a clear edge in deal origination and closure.

19+ Yrs Corporate | Real Estate Broker
